site.title: Rail Coach Factory, Kapurthala
site.subtitle: Ministry of Railways, Government of India

home.welcomeText: Rail Coach Factory (RCF), Kapurthala is one of the premier production units of Indian Railways, engaged in the manufacture of all types of railway passenger coaches. Established in 1986 with German collaboration, RCF has grown to become a symbol of excellence in coach manufacturing.

about.title: About Rail Coach Factory
about.historyText: Rail Coach Factory (RCF), Kapurthala was established in 1986 as a state-of-the-art coach manufacturing unit of Indian Railways. It was set up with technical collaboration from M/s Linke Hofmann Busch (LHB), Germany. Over the years, RCF has emerged as one of the most modern and largest coach manufacturing facilities in India.
about.missionText: To manufacture world-class railway coaches using cutting-edge technology, ensuring passenger safety and comfort while adhering to the highest quality standards.
about.visionText: To be a global leader in railway coach manufacturing, setting benchmarks in innovation, sustainability, and customer satisfaction.
about.achievement2: Largest LHB coach manufacturing facility in India
about.achievement3: Export of coaches to multiple countries
about.achievement5: Pioneer in Vande Bharat coach manufacturing

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.addressText: Rail Coach Factory, Kapurthala - 144602, Punjab, India
contact.byRailText: Kapurthala railway station is well connected to major cities. Direct trains available from Delhi, Mumbai, and Kolkata.
contact.byRoadText: Kapurthala is well connected by road. NH-1 passes through Jalandhar which is 20 km from Kapurthala.
contact.byAirText: Nearest airport is Sri Guru Ram Dass Jee International Airport, Amritsar (85 km) and Adampur Airport (30 km).
